quests.name: First Journey
quests.description: Travel to Alpha Centauri to register your ship with the Atlas Federation.

quests.name: Barnard Recon
quests.description: The Federation wants a status report on Barnard's Star. Fly there and scan the system.

quests.name: Research Materials
quests.description: Transport experimental materials from Vega to the researchers at Cygnus Station.

quests.name: Tribune Signal
quests.description: A strange signal is coming from the Tribune system. Investigate its origin.

quests.name: Rescue the Princess
quests.description: The princess of Proxima fled her wedding and is now drifting in a lifepod somewhere in the system. Find her and bring her back to the station.
